name: Carambola Broccoli Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 cups broccoli florets, steamed until crisp-tender and cooled
1 teaspoon (or to taste) freshly squeezed lime juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the broccoli florets, carambola, golden raisins, red onion rings, and water chestnuts in a large bowl.
2. Stir gently until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. In a small bowl, mix together the nonfat plain yogurt, fat-free mayo, and lime juice.
4. Blend until smooth and stir into the salad mixture.
5. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld before serving.
